title: 3 Stocks to Keep an Eye on for Superb Earnings Acceleration

title: Norwegian: 2023 Is The Inflection Year

title: 7 Investments To Avoid In 2023
text: As is usual at the start of a new year, many Seeking Alpha contributors have shared their lists of where to put your money during 2023. But not losing money with your investments is almost as important as making money.

title: Norwegian Cruise (NCLH) Gains 18% in Past 6 Months: Here's How

title: Norwegian Cruise to offer $500 million of five-year bonds with proceeds earmarked for paying down debt
text: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. NCLH, -2.94% said Thursday it is proposing to offer $500 million of senior secured bonds that mature in 2028 in a private offering.
